function.name: _execute_informat_script_designer
function.description:
Execute the specified method of the Informat script file in the [Application Designer Environment]. Mainly used for script development, debugging, and verification.

Execution instructions:
- The executed script must exist in the [Designer Script List] (unpublished status is also acceptable)
- If scriptId is not specified, the script to be executed can be inferred based on context
- If the script is newly created but not yet saved, the script file should be saved first before executing the method
- If functionName is not specified, the method to be called can be inferred based on user intent
- Only real functions exported through export in the script can be called, calling non-existent methods is prohibited
- The execution process will not modify the script content, nor will it create temporary or test script files

Applicable scenarios:
- In-designer script debugging
- Function verification and logic testing
- Script execution before application release.

functionName.description: Function name, needs to be an exported method

functionParams.description: Input parameters required to execute the target function, passed in order; if the function requires no parameters, an empty array [] can be passed
